title: bauhinia glauca var. pernervosa
intro: Bauhinia glauca var. pernervosa, also known as Bauhinia glauca 'Pernervosa', is a variety of the Bauhinia glauca plant, which is a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Bauhinia glauca var. pernervosa include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and stems are used in various herbal preparations, including capsules and ointments.
